name: doota-workspace
//: Workspace root. No app code lives here — the SvelteKit app is apps/web (package name 'doota'), the landing site is landing, the mail Workers are workers/*. These scripts just orchestrate the member packages via pnpm --filter.

scripts.deploy:workers: pnpm run deploy:mail-in && pnpm run deploy:mail-jobs
scripts.deploy:all: pnpm run deploy && pnpm run deploy:workers
